HERO.TITLE: Rtanj Milk Tea
HERO.SUBTITLE: Mystical Vitality Brew — Backed by Science

LEGEND.HEADING: THE LEGEND OF RTANJ
LEGEND.PARAGRAPH_2: For centuries, this mysterious pyramid-shaped mountain in Serbia has inspired stories of hidden energies, natural vitality, and unexplained phenomena. Its perfect geometric form — unlike any natural mountain — has drawn seekers, scientists, and storytellers alike.
LEGEND.PARAGRAPH_3: But beyond the legends, one truth remains:
LEGEND.PARAGRAPH_3_1: Rtanj nurtures some of Europe"s most powerful medicinal herbs.
LEGEND.PARAGRAPH_3_2: The mountain"s unique microclimate, mineral-rich soil, and altitude create conditions that concentrate the bioactive compounds in every plant that grows on its slopes.

INGREDIENTS.INGREDIENT_1_DESC: A legendary herb from the slopes of Mount Rtanj, traditionally cherished for centuries. From ancient herbal wisdom to modern science, Rtanj tea continues to be a source of strength and resilience.

FORMULATION.TITLE: PRODUCT FORMULATION
FORMULATION.DESCRIPTION_PART1: A unique fusion of four carefully chosen ingredients. Not a tea. Not a milk drink.
FORMULATION.LAYER_1_DESC: Wild-harvested from the slopes of Mount Rtanj. Centuries of traditional use, confirmed by modern phytochemistry.
FORMULATION.LAYER_2_DESC: Freeze-dried to preserve every bioactive enzyme, protein, and mineral. The rarest milk on Earth, made accessible.
FORMULATION.LAYER_3_DESC: Pure mountain honey that naturally balances the blend — gently sweet, rich in enzymes and trace minerals.
FORMULATION.LAYER_4_DESC: Functional boba pearls made from plant-based pectin. The textural signature that makes this experience unique.
FORMULATION.FOOTER: Tradition inspires us. Science guides us. Wellness is our purpose.

SENSORY.TITLE: THE EXPERIENCE
SENSORY.HEADING: A Multi-Sensory Experience
SENSORY.SUBTITLE: Wellness you can taste. Nature you can trust.
SENSORY.AROMA_DESC: The lyophilized donkey milk dissolves into a velvety base that coats the palate with gentle richness.
SENSORY.TASTE_DESC: Mountain honey provides just enough sweetness to harmonize the blend without masking its depth.
SENSORY.HERBAL_DESC: Wild Satureja montana brings a complex, slightly peppery herbal note — unmistakably mountain-born.
SENSORY.TEXTURE_DESC: Each pearl bursts with a subtle flavor — a new way to experience functional nutrition.

HOWTO.TITLE: THE RITUAL
HOWTO.SUBTITLE: Just 30 seconds from powder to wellness. Simple, elegant, effective.
HOWTO.STEP_1_DESC: Pour 25g of Immunasina Rtanj Wild Latte or Rtanj Boba Tea powder into your glass or shaker bottle.
HOWTO.STEP_2_DESC: Add 220ml of cold water (about 7.5 fl oz). Room temperature or chilled water works beautifully.
HOWTO.STEP_3_DESC: Blend or shake vigorously for 30 seconds until smooth and creamy. The powder dissolves completely.
HOWTO.STEP_4_DESC: Pour into your favorite cup and enjoy immediately. No straining needed. Pure functional nutrition.
HOWTO.FOOTER_2: For extra creaminess, use blender. For on-the-go, use a shaker bottle — the 30-second shake is all you need.

PILLARS.TITLE: WHY IT WORKS
PILLARS.PILLAR_1_DESC: Lysozyme and lactoferrin from donkey milk work alongside the polyphenols of Satureja montana to support your body"s natural defense mechanisms.
PILLARS.PILLAR_2_DESC: The protein profile of donkey milk closely mirrors human milk, making it exceptionally gentle. Pectin jelly pearls add functional fiber that supports digestive balance.
PILLARS.PILLAR_3_DESC: A rich matrix of vitamins, minerals, and botanical compounds from Rtanj"s wild herbs delivers sustained energy and daily vitality without stimulants.
